scope: United States Chevrolet fleet, government, Special Equipment Option, and other specialty exterior colors. Forest Service Green is retained as a named USDA research lead without an invented Chevrolet model-year application.

required_fields: exact Chevrolet model or model variant
manufacturer-printed paint, option, or SEO code
publication_policy.mutable_source_rule: A mutable API response is not permanent evidence unless the complete response bytes, retrieval timestamp, and SHA-256 digest are retained. Complete generated GM Order Guide PDFs satisfy this rule for the captured snapshot.
publication_policy.identity_rule: Similar green labels and repeated SEO codes are not treated as the same paint identity without an explicit primary-source bridge.

integrity_audit.publication_boundary: Only the 19 app_publication_records, expanding to 21 exact model-year applications, were promoted. The five no-RPO rows on the 2003 SEO chart remain research-only because the adjacent TGK ordering table expressly identifies only four orderable specialty colors. Located or rendered candidate pages were not promoted without direct visual review.

search_leads.title: Specialty research lead / Forest Service Green
search_leads.subtitle: USDA Forest Service, Federal Standard No. 595 color 14260; Chevrolet applicability unresolved
terms: 5032 Forest Service Green is a separate unresolved identifier

app_publication_records.label: Woodland Green
restrictions: Special Equipment Option paint was available as a solid color only.
Woodland Green could be ordered only on Pickups, Chassis-Cabs, Blazer, and Suburban models.

source.title: 1980 Chevrolet Truck Vehicle Information Kit
source.section: Special Paints; Permanent Fleet Colors; 10-90 Series Models Only

app_publication_records.label: Woodland Green
restrictions: Requires SEO TGK Special Paint One Color.
Available only on Tahoe LS equipment groups 1SJ and 1SK and Tahoe LT equipment group 1SM; not available on Z71 equipment group 1SL.
Wheel flares, moldings, bumper pads, outside mirror backs, and door handles were black.

app_publication_records.label: Woodland Green
restrictions: SEO paint scope is limited to the printed PPV and 5W4 Tahoe variants.
Normally body-colored non-sheet-metal parts were flat black, except Victory Red parts matched the body.
Orders containing fewer than five vehicles were delayed until the five-unit batch minimum was received.
The pages also offered special paint for PPV and 5W4 Tahoes through the Kerr Industries dealer direct program and stated that this program had no minimum order.

app_publication_records.label: Woodland Green
restrictions: SEO paint scope is limited to Express Transport Van 1LS and 2LS.
All normally body-colored non-sheet-metal parts were flat black.
Orders containing fewer than five vehicles were delayed until the five-unit batch minimum was received.

app_publication_records.label: Woodland Green
restrictions: SEO paint scope is limited to Suburban Commercial Fleet 1FL.
Normally body-colored non-sheet-metal parts were flat black, except Victory Red parts matched the body.
Orders containing fewer than five vehicles were delayed until the five-unit batch minimum was received.

app_publication_records.label: Woodland Green
restrictions: SEO paint scope is limited to Silverado 2500HD Crew Cab 4WD Work Truck 1WT.
Door handles and mirrors were flat black; standard or package body-side moldings were deleted.
All normally body-colored non-sheet-metal parts were flat black.
Orders containing fewer than five vehicles were delayed until the five-unit batch minimum was received.

verified_not_published.reason: The current archive already has a qualified 2025 palette generation with a different source. The one-source-per-model-year display contract cannot expose both sources without losing provenance.

restrictions: GM required five orders before plant submission.

rejected_or_unresolved_leads.lead: A Wikimedia Commons image caption identifies a 2002 Chevrolet Silverado K2500HD as Forest Service Green.
rejected_or_unresolved_leads.reason: An uploader caption and photograph do not establish factory paint, original finish, exact GM code, restriction, or orderability.

rejected_or_unresolved_leads.lead: 2002 Chevrolet Silverado and Silverado HD official vehicle information kits
rejected_or_unresolved_leads.reason: The complete scanned kits were reviewed as source candidates, but no page located in this pass tied Forest Service Green to a Chevrolet model, year, or GM code.
Searches of the official GM, GM Upfitter, and USDA source sets found no manufacturer or agency paint label exactly named Forestry Green.

rejected_or_unresolved_leads.lead: Equating historical Woodland Green option 46 / SEO 9V5 with modern Woodland Green WA-9015 / 9V5
rejected_or_unresolved_leads.reason: The repeated label and SEO code are leads, not an explicit primary-source identity bridge.

rejected_or_unresolved_leads.lead: Equating USDA identifier 5032 with Federal Standard No. 595 color 14260
rejected_or_unresolved_leads.reason: Separate official USDA specifications print each identifier, but no reviewed primary source explicitly states that they are the same standard color.
